summary: Completed comprehensive testing of JayTee Portfolio website. All 7 pages functional with React Router navigation, AI tools working correctly, backend APIs 100% passing. Only minor mobile navigation and contact form selector issues found.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile menu button is hidden due to md:hidden class not working correctly at mobile breakpoint
Form input selectors not matching expected structure (name attribute vs data-testid)

passed_tests: Backend API health endpoint (200)
Backend notes list API (3 seeded notes returned)
Backend note detail API with valid slug
Backend note 404 handling for invalid slug
Backend Chaos Translator AI tool (full workflow with 10-15s response)
Backend Bloat Detector AI tool with proper validation
Backend contact form submission and validation
Frontend all 7 navigation links present and clickable
Frontend homepage hero section with 'Turns ambiguity into' text
Frontend operating sequence with all 4 steps (Structure, Connect, Leverage, Refine)
Frontend selected systems showing Job Forge, ChurnWise, Transplant Tracker
Frontend ecosystem signal strip with Nemurium, iMMerSiveTechs, VibeForge
Frontend About page with philosophy and brand architecture
Frontend Work page with all 3 projects displaying correctly
Frontend Work With Me page with all 4 service tiers including Flagship badge
Frontend Tools page with Chaos Translator and Bloat Detector tabs
Frontend Tools Chaos Translator functionality (AI integration working)
Frontend Tools tab switching between Chaos Translator and Bloat Detector
Frontend Notes page navigation and layout
Frontend Notes detail page navigation and back functionality
React Router v7 real URL routing (no hash routing) working correctly
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (10/10 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (20/21 major features working)
